post.title: Using PostgreSQL Arrays in a Hasura Mutation
post.description: Until Hasura supports PostgreSQL arrays as a first class citicen, it is not straight forwart to use such an array in a GraphQL mutation.
post.content:
const myArray = ["Alice", "Bob"]

const query = gql`
mutation ($array: _text!)) {
  update_array(_set: {array: $array}, where: {...}) {
    returning {
      array
    }
  }
}`

const variables = {
  array: JSON.stringify(myArray).replace(/^\[/, '{').replace(/\]$/, '}')
}
